name: Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 loaf French bread or baguette, with crust, cubed
2 large Granny Smith apples peeled, cored and chopped
1/2 pound cream cheese, chilled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Butter a 13x9-inch glass casserole or lasagna pan.
3. Melt the butter in a medium saucepan, add the bread cubes and stir to coat evenly.
4. Spread the cubes on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes or until lightly brown and crisp.
5. Remove the bread and turn up the oven temperature to 440 degrees.
6. Combine the sugar and water in a saucepan and bring to a boil. Remove from the heat. Stir in the cinnamon and set aside.
7. In a large mixing bowl, combine the chopped apples, walnuts, cream cheese and toasted bread cubes. Drizzle with the reserved sugar syrup and mix evenly.
8. Transfer the mixture to the prepared pan.
9. Bake, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes. Then bake an additional 5 minutes without stirring, until the top is golden brown and crusty and the liquid is almost gone.
10. Serve warm with pitchers of heavy cream for adding at the table.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings
